reviewText: Arrived on time, well packaged. Works exactly as described and feels durable. Would buy again.
Stopped working after a month. Support was slow to respond. Not worth the price in my opinion.
Solid value. A few minor cosmetic flaws but nothing that affects daily use. Instructions could be clearer.
Misleading photos. Item feels cheap and broke the first day. Requested a refund.
Best purchase this year. Simple setup and great performance. Friends asked where I bought it.
Average product. Does the job but nothing special. Shipping took longer than expected.
Looks great on the shelf. Runs quietly. Wish the cable was a bit longer but overall happy.
Firmware bugs caused random restarts. After an update it improved slightly but still flaky.
